tools.name: nimux.scan
tools.description: Run a TCP or UDP scan with JSON output.

tools.name: nimux.smb_enum
tools.description: Run SMB enumeration against an authorized target.

tools.name: nimux.ldap_query
tools.description: Run named LDAP queries or a raw LDAP filter.

tools.name: nimux.winrm_command
tools.description: Run a WinRM command after explicit approval.

tools.name: nimux.gpo_dry_run
tools.description: Preview a GPO operation with dry-run.

tools.name: nimux.gpo_apply
tools.description: Apply an approved GPO operation with rollback output.

tools.name: nimux.socks_deploy
tools.description: Deploy the native nimux SOCKS helper as a background pivot after explicit approval.

tools.name: nimux.socks_status
tools.description: Return stored metadata for a running nimux SOCKS pivot.

tools.name: nimux.socks_cleanup
tools.description: Cleanup a previously deployed nimux SOCKS pivot helper.

tools.name: nimux.proxy_scan
tools.description: Run nimux scan through a stored pivot by resolving pivot_id to --proxy.

tools.name: nimux.proxy_command
tools.description: Run an approved nimux command family through a stored pivot with --proxy.

tools.name: nimux.report_summary
tools.description: Summarize JSONL evidence and redact sensitive values.

tools.name: nimux.file_operation
tools.description: Run an approved SMB file operation using put, get, ls, mkdir, or rm.

tools.name: nimux.database_query
tools.description: Run an approved database query through mssql, postgres, or mysql.

tools.name: nimux.remote_exec
tools.description: Run an approved remote execution action through winrm, scm, bin, cim, tsch, mmc, ssh, mssql, or postgres.

tools.name: nimux.secrets
tools.description: Run an approved secrets collection or DCSync workflow with redaction enabled by default.

tools.name: nimux.protocol_probe
tools.description: Run a read-only protocol probe for http, rdp, ftp, vnc, nfs, afp, webdav, ssh, mysql, postgres, or mssql.
